metric_scope_rule: Every executed study predating the 2026-07-14 request-snapshot correction is historical/non-governing unless explicitly rescored under v2.
selection_rule: Executed historical designs are reported in full, including null cells. Domain-blocked mechanisms are not assigned invented parameter ranges. No cell may be promoted from this retrospective inventory.

executed_studies.purpose: physical outcome sensitivity, not adaptive-value sensitivity
executed_studies.metric_scope: includes ret_excel outputs but does not compute H_PI or H_obs
executed_studies.claim_limit: Cannot rank adaptive headroom or close any policy family.
Pilot only; cannot rank adaptive headroom or close any policy family.

executed_studies.metric_scope: ret_excel_visible_v1 within three restricted local action families
executed_studies.claim_limit: Complete only for the versioned local branch portfolio; not a full-horizon family ceiling.

executed_studies.study: Historical Program-I adaptive-headroom Morris and GP reconstruction
executed_studies.purpose: adaptive-value sensitivity in the historical stylized spatial adapter
executed_studies.metric_scope: ret_order/full-ledger order adapter, not full-DES ret_excel_visible_v1
executed_studies.result: Aggregate verdicts reproduce exactly. The located positive region is out-of-sample stable on its adapter but fails worst-CSSU fill by about 0.13.
executed_studies.claim_limit: Retrospective burned-tape construct sensitivity only; not governing H_PI/H_obs.

executed_studies.study: Concurrent 64-cell VOI atlas and corrective audit
executed_studies.metric_scope: source atlas uses wrong full-order formula; direct visible optimization degenerates to HOLD^4 shed-to-win
executed_studies.result: Both apparent positive cells fail lost-order noninferiority; no governing H_obs or ceiling.

active_unscreened_or_incomplete.family: Program M finite shared-lift advance reservation
active_unscreened_or_incomplete.reason: The complete screen found a maximum mean H_PI of 0.0362453 and froze six cells. Fresh simultaneous validation found two high-hazard/120-hour cells with LCB95 0.022779, but the adjacent h50/120 cells had LCB95 0.009006 and h75/72 cells had negative LCBs. No component satisfied the frozen hazard-duration stability rule.
active_unscreened_or_incomplete.next: STOP frozen Program M before H_obs. Do not add or tune cells. Reopen advance reservation only through a materially different mechanism; shift active search to a distinct family.

active_unscreened_or_incomplete.reason: The current adapter is action-dead and its historical full-ledger and visible-v1 scores are non-governing.
active_unscreened_or_incomplete.next: Do not replay the dead adapter; require a materially new route/lag mechanism with endpoint liveness before any v2 screen.

active_unscreened_or_incomplete.reason: A central v2 cell has a complete 6,561-schedule frontier and a tiny resource-restricted PI delta, but the 108-cell grid is not yet screened.
active_unscreened_or_incomplete.next: Retain as a secondary ceiling map. Do not displace Program M: the central v2 delta is 54.7 times below the practical gate and the wider screen is expected to refine a null rather than locate the strongest prior headroom clue.

active_unscreened_or_incomplete.reason: All historical switch frontiers used the quarantined visible-v1 metric; the stopped VPS run produced no result.
active_unscreened_or_incomplete.next: Restart from the first burned calibration tape only after the v2 contract is immutable; retain the W24/global-bound requirement and whole-session watcher.

domain_blocked_design_rule: No numerical cell is created for an extension until its action, observations, resource ledger, plausible envelope, null regime and later face-validation question are frozen. A disclosed synthetic development extension may be screened before expert response only with a conditional claim limit; it cannot be presented as thesis-native or domain-validated. Absence of invented cells is deliberate fail-closed governance, not evidence of a null.
portfolio_conclusion: All executed sensitivity rows are now discoverable and content-addressed. The portfolio still lacks governing-metric family-wide H_PI/H_obs ceilings and therefore supports neither Return A nor Return B.
